entries.text:
Verse 4

world

kosmos = world-system. Revelation 11:15; John 7:7. (See Scofield "Revelation 13:8").

Verse 7

It is generally agreed that 1 John 5:7 has no real authority, and has been inserted. 1 John 5:7.

Verse 8

in earth Omit "in earth."

agree Or, are to one point or purpose.

Verse 16

sin

Sin. (See Scofield "Romans 3:23") .
